description.en: Direct-observation tool standardising the language and assessment of polypectomy competence across cold-snare and hot-snare techniques. Components map to Tate EMR 2023 Recs 17 (cold snare) and 20 (hot snare). Initial seed encodes a representative subset of Table 4 items; remaining items will be added in subsequent commits.

guidance.en: Snare of appropriate size and type for the polyp (thin wire vs. thick wire; dedicated cold vs. hot).
Good capture of polyp tissue within snare; use of downward pressure; use of gas aspiration resulting in complete capture of adequate target tissue.

label.en: Snare precisely visualised during placement and closure (V of the snare)

guidance.en: Snare V visualised consistently during closure and kept near the colonoscope.
Tangential dynamic injection; needle in submucosa; appropriate solution; injection clearly facilitates access to the target lesion.

label.en: Defect mucosa: detects and removes residual adenoma at margin and within defect

guidance.en: Ostensibly and systematically checks for residual adenomatous tissue within the defect and at the margin, and removes it successfully.

label.en: Defect muscularis: detects and treats deep mural injury ≥ Sydney II

guidance.en: Detects and treats Sydney DMI types II–V (or confirms they are not present).
